meaning: n.[生化](血)纤维蛋白,(血)纤维
examples: An enzyme that dissolves the fibrin of blood clots.
Commonly used filter aid agent diatomite, have fibrin.
The local accumulation of fibrin and platelets is known as a hemostatic plug.
The fibrinogen turns into fibrin, an insoluble, filamentous protein which traps the platelets and causes them to link up into a quilt that helps stop bleeding.
